parents.subject: LU-19828 kfilnd: Map intf to cxi device kfi config

commit.subject: LU-19862 osd: avoid call to ldiskfs_block_zero_page_range()
commit.message:
LU-19862 osd: avoid call to ldiskfs_block_zero_page_range()

when osd-ldiskfs truncates preallocated block, 6.12 kernel may panic
meeting an uninitialized blocks in ldiskfs_block_zero_page_range().
avoid this call.

Fixes: 1f3e4df2fb ("LU-18562 osd: llog write batch block allocation")
Signed-off-by: Alex Zhuravlev <bzzz@whamcloud.com>
Change-Id: I4d01069f30f3ca9887828f1e7c611e02cebc2dd5
